div.p: Your employee profile has been submitted and is currently pending approval by HR.
To access all portal features, please complete and submit your employee profile for approval.
Your document request is currently in state. You can update and resubmit below.
Please select the type of document you need and provide a reason.

textarea.name: reason
textarea.placeholder: Please explain why you need this document...

div.label: Attach Letter (Optional)
div.div: Upload a supporting document or request letter if required.

div.p: Your document request has been submitted for approval by the HR department.
You will be notified once it has been processed.
Your resignation request is currently in state. You can update the details below and resubmit.
We are sorry to see you go. Please provide the details for your departure.

div.label: Resignation Date *
div.div: The date you are officially notifying the bank.

div.label: Proposed Last Working Day *
div.div: The final day you intend to work.

form.div: Note: Your 30-day notice period and automatic archive date will be calculated based on the Resignation Date provided above.

div.p: Your request has been sent to HR and your Manager for approval.
Your profile details have been submitted to HR for approval.
Your user account is not linked to an employee record in the system. Please contact HR.
Your previous profile update request has been approved. If you have any new changes or updates, you can edit the form below and submit a new request for approval.

t.p: Your profile update request has been submitted and is currently pending approval by HR. You can still make changes to your details below and resubmit if needed.
Your profile update request is currently in state. You can update the details below and resubmit.

div.p: Your previous profile update request was rejected. You can edit and resubmit your details below.
Please fill out or verify the information below and submit it for approval.

button.class: btn btn-white w-100 text-start d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between form-select

input.t-att-checked: 'checked' if language_rec.id in onb_val.language_ids.ids else None

textarea.name: physical_challenge_detail
textarea.placeholder: Please provide details about the physical challenge...

div.label: I confirm that all the information provided is accurate, and complete to the best of my knowledge. * NOTE, YOU ARE STRICTLY OBLIGATED TO REATTACH YOUR EDUCATIONAL CERTIFICATION UNDER THE EDUCATION DETAILS AND YOUR PREVIOUS EXPERIENCE IF ANY!

div.class: toast align-items-center text-white bg-danger border-0 shadow-lg

button.onclick: var t = document.getElementById('validationToast'); if (t) { t.classList.remove('show'); t.style.display='none'; t.style.opacity='0'; }
